title: Checks schema
description: Schema for schemas/checks/ fragment files - code quality checks registry, config, and guidance. Each file is merged at build/runtime.

category.description: Group/category for UI (e.g. structure, naming, documentation).

parameters.description: Optional. User-customizable arguments for this rule (e.g. max_lines integer 300). UI can expose and validate.

check_exceptions.description: Per-check scope: optional include_paths (only these in scope), paths (exclude). Key = check id. Repo overrides/merges global.

include_paths.description: Optional. Repo-relative path or prefix to include (only these files in scope). If empty, all files in scope subject to paths.

paths.description: Repo-relative path (exact) or prefix (end with /) to exclude. Example: web/ or go/cmd/fon/main.go

skip_symbols.description: duplicate_symbols only: symbol names to never flag (e.g. __init__, setup). Merged with built-in framework patterns.

lines_extensions.description: File extensions checked by the lines (line count) check (e.g. .go, .py, .tsx).

run_hardcoded_check.description: Optional. When true, hardcoded_values failures count as fail (not warning).

strict_optional_checks.description: Optional check IDs that should fail the run when they fail. Default: optional checks show as warnings only.

docs.description: Comma-separated doc targets to generate on every check: cursor, kiro, srcmap. Overridden by --docs and FON_CHECK_DOCS.

well_known_yaml_basenames.description: YAML filenames excluded from schema reference (lockfiles, package-manager formats). From schemas/checks/well-known-files.yaml.

skip_basenames.description: Basenames skipped from path-based checks (tool configs, e.g. tailwind.config.js). From schemas/checks/well-known-files.yaml.

go_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable snake_case filename enforcement for Go files.

python_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable snake_case filename enforcement for Python files.

javascript_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable camelCase/PascalCase filename enforcement for JavaScript and JSX files.

typescript_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable camelCase/PascalCase filename enforcement for TypeScript and TSX files.

html_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable kebab-case filename enforcement for HTML files.

css_file_naming_enabled.description: Enable kebab-case filename enforcement for CSS files.

web_asset_exclude_basenames.description: Industry-standard web tool config filenames to exclude from kebab-case naming (e.g. postcss.config.js, tailwind.config.js).

web_asset_extensions.description: Extensions covered by the web_assets check (e.g. .js, .tsx, .css).

web_asset_naming_extensions.description: Legacy subset of web_asset_extensions that should have naming enforced. Used only as a fallback when the new per-family booleans are unset.

language_standard_basenames.description: Exact filenames that are standard for a language or framework and should be exempt from generic naming-style checks (e.g. vite-env.d.ts).

language_standard_regexes.description: Regex patterns for industry-standard filenames that should be exempt from generic naming-style checks (e.g. ^test_.*\\.py$, ^.*\\.test\\.ts$).

missing_translation.description: Optional config for the missing_translation (i18n) check: YAML locale files, namespaces, and getter-to-namespace mapping.

path.description: Path or glob, e.g. packages/frontend/src/locales/*.yaml or web/src/locales

namespaced.description: If true, top-level keys are namespaces (e.g. chat, appShell, login)

namespace_from_call.description: Map getter name to namespace, e.g. getLoginT: login, getChatT: chat
